anchor_fixtures._provenance_note: Sauna heater extracted from architect Rev-B plan dated 2026-05-18; 400x400 floor-standing electric heater rated 6kW; sited at NW corner of sauna cabin per client schedule.

zones._clause_citation: BS 7671:2018 §703 + §703.411.3.3 (sauna heater excluded from RCD blanket)
zones._derivation_note: Zone 1 = sauna heater footprint padded 500mm on every side per §703 zone-table convention. Heater at (200,1600) with 400x400 footprint padded 500mm → unclipped polygon (-300,1100)-(1100,2500); clipped to room polygon yields (0,1100)-(1100,2000). Heat-rated cable required; sauna heater circuit is EXCLUDED from the 30 mA RCD blanket per §703.411.3.3 (rcd_required_ma=null records the exemption).

zones._clause_citation: BS 7671:2018 §703 + §703.411.3.3 (30 mA RCD applies; heater excluded)
zones._derivation_note: Zone 2 = sauna body polygon (room polygon minus Zone 1 in practice; full room polygon shown for derivation transparency). Heat-rated cable required for cables passing through. Overlap with Zone 1 declared because the polygon-as-written includes the heater region — runtime subtracts Zone 1 for plan rendering. Overlap with Zone 3 because Zone 3 is the upper region of the same polygon.

Zone 3 = full sauna room polygon at height_min=1500mm to ceiling per §703 zone-table. This is the upper-volume zone where control gear, accessories, and high-mounted luminaires sit. Heat-rated cable required (ambient_temperature_c=90 per input). Overlaps Zone 2 in plan but height_min separates them vertically.

electrical_constraints._derivation_note: 30 mA RCD on all sauna LV circuits per §703.411.3.3 EXCEPT the sauna heater circuit itself — the clause body explicitly excludes the heater circuit because tripping the heater on a thermal-pulse residual current would defeat the sauna heating function. Heater circuit instead has fault-protection via the dedicated heater controller.

assumptions: Sauna heater Zone 1 padding defaulted to 500mm per §703 zone-table convention.
Heat-rated cable assumed for all circuits inside the sauna cabin (ambient_temperature_c=90°C per input).
Zone 2 polygon shown as full room rectangle in IR; runtime subtracts Zone 1 footprint for plan rendering — overlap with Zone 1 declared accordingly.

invariants.evidence: 1 anchor (heater_1) produces 3 zones (z1+z2+z3) per §703 3-zone split. Overlapping pairs declared: z1↔z2 (plan inclusion — runtime subtracts), z2↔z3 (vertical separation but same plan polygon). No silent merges.
existing_fixtures_audit[] has 2 compliant entries; non_compliance_flags[] empty. One-to-one trivially holds.
No medical_envelope_group_2 zone. §710 medical IT system N/A.

room_type=sauna; rcd_blanket_by_room constraint present with rcd_rating_ma=30 AND sauna_heater_excluded=true per BS 7671:2018 §703.411.3.3 clause body. Heater exemption is the sauna-specific carve-out.
Not a swimming_pool_hall. §702.415.1 main bonding N/A.
No bath_basin anchor. §701.512.2 whirlpool pump N/A.

2 fixtures audited: lum_1 sauna_luminaire (IPx4, 230V) at (1200,1000,2400) inside zone_heater_1_z3 (height 1500-2400; ceiling-mounted at 2400 = top edge — included). Type allowed (sauna_luminaire not in prohibited list); IPx4 ≥ IPx4 min; voltage 230V ≤ 230V; not a switch. PASS. thermostat_1 (IPx4, 230V) at (1800,1800,1600) inside zone_heater_1_z3 (z=1600 within 1500-2400). PASS.
compliant=true ∧ violation_count_critical=0 ∧ non_compliance_flags=[]. Declared overlaps are catalogued cross-references (z1↔z2 plan inclusion; z2↔z3 vertical-separation pair) — not silent merges.

rationale.chat_summary: Standalone sauna — 2400×2000mm cabin with 6 kW corner heater. 3 zones derived per §703 zone-table (zone_1 around heater 500mm padded; zone_2 sauna body; zone_3 above 1.5m). rcd_blanket_by_room per §703.411.3.3 with sauna_heater_excluded=true (heater exemption). 2 fixtures (sauna luminaire + thermostat sensor) both compliant. All 10 INVs PASS.

sections.title: Standards applied
sections.summary: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §703 governs sauna zoning. §703.411.3.3 mandates 30 mA RCD blanket on all sauna LV circuits EXCEPT the sauna heater circuit itself — this is the clause body exemption preserved as sauna_heater_excluded=true. Zone 1 around the heater is padded 500mm per the §703 zone-table convention (the verified file does not give a numeric value for the padding — 500mm is the engineering convention captured in the assumption). Zone 3 starts at 1500mm AFF per §703.

sections.title: Zone derivation logic
sections.summary: Heater_1 (400x400 at NW corner (200,1600)) produces 3 zones. Zone 1 = footprint + 500mm padding → unclipped (-300,1100)-(1100,2500), clipped to room polygon = (0,1100)-(1100,2000). Zone 2 = sauna body polygon (full room shown for transparency; runtime subtracts Zone 1 for plan). Zone 3 = full room polygon from height_min=1500mm to ceiling 2400mm. Overlap declarations: Zone 1↔Zone 2 (Zone 2 polygon-as-written includes Zone 1 region; runtime subtracts); Zone 2↔Zone 3 (vertical separation — overlap in plan, not in 3D).

sections.title: Honest disclosures
sections.summary: Three assumptions in calculation_summary.assumptions[]: 500mm heater padding is engineering convention (not numerically codified in verified §703); heat-rated cable required (ambient_temperature_c=90°C); Zone 2 polygon-as-written includes Zone 1 region with explicit overlap declaration. No banned §703 sub-clauses used — only verified §703 + §703.411.3.3 per spec §3.2.

sections.title: Failure modes considered
sections.summary: If the sauna heater circuit were placed under the RCD blanket (sauna_heater_excluded=false in error), the heater would trip during normal operation due to thermal-pulse residual current — INV-04 would FAIL with sub-rule sauna_heater_excluded_required_true. If a generic 230V socket were placed in Zone 1, INV-08 sub-rule type_prohibited would FAIL. If a non-IP-rated luminaire were placed at any height inside the sauna, INV-08 sub-rule type_prohibited would FAIL.
